headline: Is this the Best Time to Buy CDW Corporation (CDW)?
summary: Middle Coast Investing, an investment advisor firm, released its second-quarter 2026 investor letter. A copy of the letter can be downloaded here. Q2 marked the S&P 500’s best quarter since Q2 2020, yet underlying market dynamics remained unchanged. The letter highlighted that the market’s performance continued to rely on trends and baskets rather than company […]
